title: neurogramma fraxinea
intro: Neurogramma fraxinea is a plant species commonly known as the 'brain tree' due to its unique appearance and reported cognitive-enhancing properties. This plant is believed to have medicinal properties that may help reduce inflammation and improve overall brain health. Neurogramma fraxinea is said to have a range of health benefits, including improved memory and cognitive function, as well as a potential reduction in anxiety and stress levels. In herbal preparations, Neurogramma fraxinea is often used to create teas, capsules, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects on human health.
